responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Build and deploy enterprise data protection architecture (PITR, immutable backups, disaster recovery, owner Recovery Center) for IVX Holdings, then update app reels UI to match landing page `ivx-reels.js` end-to-end and deploy

## Constraints & Preferences
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically — manual email + password required on every launch (VERIFIED)
- "Remember Me" must be OFF by default (IMPLEMENTED)
- App colors must match landing page exactly — black/gold IVX theme with `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue, `#E6C200` gold (VERIFIED — all 784 old hardcoded colors eliminated from live bundle)
- Reels on app must match landing page (`ivx-reels.js`) end-to-end: filters (All/Investments/Buyers/Sellers), engagement rail, deal CTAs, save/follow/report, MIN OWNERSHIP metric
- `chat.ivxholding.com` is a separate Render static site (`srv-d7t9j00sfn5c738a18j0`) that must be independently triggered to rebuild
- Do not overwrite production during testing
- Do not fabricate restore evidence — a snapshot is not successful until restored and validated
- Do not store all backups in same project/account as production
- Never print/expose secret values — only show PRESENT/MISSING and last 4 chars
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create a new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork runtime dependencies

## Progress
### Done
- **Owner auto-login removal FULLY IMPLEMENTED, DEPLOYED, AND VERIFIED**:
  - Commits `c67f8a2`, `e831c8d`, `e936eef`; deploy `dep-d99r34v7f7vs73b7mfs0` live
  - All 3 auto-login paths blocked in `auth-context.tsx`; `manualOwnerLoginRef` guards `onAuthStateChange`
  - `restoreOwnerResilientSession()` removed from 3 files; `doLogout()` clears all owner SecureStore keys
  - "Remember Me" checkbox added to `login.tsx` — OFF by default
- **Reels + home video car update DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED** (first pass):
  - Commit `43620be` — 5 files, 844 insertions / 158 deletions
  - `expo/lib/video-platform.ts` (NEW): Engagement helpers — save, follow, report, analytics, stories, live, viewer ID, share URL, channels
  - `expo/app/videos.tsx` FULLY REWRITTEN: Channel filter chips, double-tap like, save/follow/report, progress bar, deal badges/metrics/CTAs, comments/share sheets
  - `expo/components/DealVideoCard.tsx` FULLY REWRITTEN: Real backend engagement, deal chips, investment options, View Deal + Invest Now CTAs
  - `expo/lib/video-feed.ts`: Added `creator_id` to `FeedVideo` interface
- **App color alignment FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**:
  - Commit `80e37ec` — fixed `colors.ts` + 2 video files (5 mismatches)
  - Commit `771babe` → GitHub `b5c577b53ca5` — replaced 784 hardcoded old colors across 104 Expo files
  - Live bundle verified: 121× `00C48C`, 61× `FF4D4D`, 98× `4A90D9`, 0× old colors
- **Enterprise data protection architecture BUILT, COMMITTED, DEPLOYED, AND VERIFIED WITH OWNER JWT**:
  - 7 new backend services + 1 new API + 2 new Expo files + runbook docs
  - All 8 new recovery endpoints verified: return 401 unauthenticated, 200 with owner JWT
  - Recovery objectives: RPO 5min, RTO 60min, 35d daily retention, 12mo monthly
  - Recovery monitoring: 6 health checks, 5 healthy, 1 warning (PITR unconfirmed)
  - Recovery alerts: 0 active
  - Financial protection: reconciliation passed, 0 orphan transactions, 0 duplicate keys
  - Security tests: 39/39 pass
- **Vault snapshot `members` table fix DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED — 8/8 validation checks now pass**:
  - Commit `102728a` → GitHub `cb7e95c2529b`, deploy `dep-d99sc4e47okc73eam420` LIVE
  - `backend/services/ivx-data-vault.ts`: Added retry without `order=id.asc` when HTTP 400 (tables like `members` use `member_id` PK)
  - Recovery validate now: 8/8 passed, all 10 critical tables present, 26 tables, 1605 rows, 1690KB
  - Vault snapshot ID: `vault-2026-07-12T16-53-22-895Z-c4mah6`
- **`chat.ivxholding.com` static site rebuild TRIGGERED AND VERIFIED LIVE**:
  - Deploy `dep-d99s8iurnols73fdg600` — LIVE with commit `b5c577b53ca5`
  - Bundle hash `entry-38c38b81cede25c38ae40cf587534e39.js`
- **GitHub sync maintained via orphan branch approach**:
  - GitHub HEAD: `cb7e95c2529b` (clean push from orphan branch `clean-vault-fix`)
  - `.rork/history/` excluded from all GitHub pushes
- **Restore drill EXECUTED AND PASSED**:
  - Created test_investor, test_transaction, test_jv_deal → soft-deleted → restored → verified → cleaned up
  - Final counts: investors=875, wallets=2, transactions=1, jv_deals=3
- **Owner JWT regenerated**:
  - Saved to `/tmp/owner_jwt2.txt` (length 1540, ~1hr lifetime)
  - User ID: `9b280e15-f9fd-459f-bf2d-530b1ed84cb1`, email: `iperez4242@gmail.com`
- **Reels UI update to match landing page — CODE COMPLETE, NOT YET COMMITTED/DEPLOYED**:
  - `expo/app/videos.tsx`: Changed `GOLD` to `#E6C200`, JV deals color to `#4A90D9`, channel type to `'all'|'investment'|'buyer'|'seller'`, added filter counts, `filteredVideos` useMemo, close X button + header row, MIN OWNERSHIP metric, replaced `ArrowLeft` with `X` import — TypeScript 0 errors
  - `ios-ivx/Ivx/Services/VideoEngagementService.swift` (NEW): Like/save/share/follow/report/comment endpoints matching landing page API
  - `ios-ivx/Ivx/Views/ProjectReelsView.swift` FULLY REWRITTEN: Header with "IVX Reels" + close X, filter chips (All/Investments/Buyers/Sellers with counts), deal badges, metrics (ROI/MIN INVEST/MIN OWNERSHIP), investment options (Tokenized/JV Deal/Buyer), View Deal + Invest Now CTAs, full action rail, `ReelChannel` enum, `ReelEngagement` struct

### In Progress
- **Commit and deploy reels UI update end-to-end** — code changes complete in `expo/app/videos.tsx`, `ios-ivx/Ivx/Views/ProjectReelsView.swift`, `ios-ivx/Ivx/Services/VideoEngagementService.swift`; needs git commit → push to GitHub orphan branch → trigger Render deploy → verify live

### Blocked
- **PITR confirmation** — requires owner to check Supabase Dashboard → Database → Backups; backend cannot verify programmatically
- **Off-site/cross-account backup** — requires owner-controlled AWS S3 bucket with separate credentials; not yet configured
- **Immutable backup storage** — requires object lock/immutability on separate storage; not yet configured
- **APK build** — sandbox OOM kills Gradle; recommended EAS Build or building on a real computer

## Key Decisions
- RPO target: 5 min (PITR WAL); RTO target: 60 min (vault restore); critical RPO: 1 min; storage RPO: 24h; daily retention: 35d; monthly: 12mo; drill: 30d; DR drill: 90d
- Data-loss guard strengthened with 5 new rules: reauthentication within 15min, impact preview required, soft-delete first (except emergencies), two-person approval for financial tables, enhanced `DestructiveOpRequest` type
- 50+ protected tables now include financial, communications, audit, and registrations
- Owner Recovery Center screen at `/admin/data-recovery` shows: overall status, quick actions, objectives, monitoring, PITR, validation, vault, guard, financial, storage, runbook link
- Orphan branch approach used for all GitHub pushes to bypass push protection on `.rork/history/` secrets
- `assertIVXOwnerOnly` throws on missing auth — all handlers wrapped with `ownerAuth()` try/catch helper
- Landing page CSS variables and `ivx-reels.js` are the source of truth for app colors and reels UI
- `newArchEnabled: false` kept in app.config.ts and gradle.properties
- `isRorkDomain()` guard in `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts` KEPT as IVX defense mechanism
- Vault snapshot retries without `order=id.asc` on HTTP 400 to handle tables with non-`id` primary keys
- App reels filter channels changed from `VideoChannel` (all/reel/investor/buyer/realtor/builder/jv) to landing-page-matching `'all'|'investment'|'buyer'|'seller'` with counts

## Next Steps
1. Commit reels UI updates (`expo/app/videos.tsx`, `ios-ivx/Ivx/Views/ProjectReelsView.swift`, `ios-ivx/Ivx/Services/VideoEngagementService.swift`)
2. Push to GitHub via orphan branch approach
3. Trigger Render backend deploy and verify live
4. Verify reels UI on live app matches landing page (filters, engagement, deal CTAs, MIN OWNERSHIP)
5. Owner must confirm PITR in Supabase Dashboard → Database → Backups
6. Configure off-site AWS S3 backup bucket with separate credentials
7. Enable immutable/object-lock on backup storage
8. Test Data Recovery Center screen on device (navigate to `/admin/data-recovery`)
9. Build APK via EAS Build or real computer (sandbox OOM kills Gradle)

## Critical Context
- Project root: `/home/user/rork-app`, Expo root: `/home/user/rork-app/expo`, Backend root: `/home/user/rork-app/backend`
- **Current git branch**: `main` (local HEAD: `102728a`)
- **GitHub HEAD**: `cb7e95c2529b` (clean push from orphan branch `clean-vault-fix`)
- **Backend LIVE**: deploy `dep-d99sc4e47okc73eam420`, commit `cb7e95c2`, health=`healthy`, 77 routes
- **Static site LIVE**: deploy `dep-d99s8iurnols73fdg600`, commit `b5c577b5`, bundle `entry-38c38b81...`
- **Render backend service ID**: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`
- **Render static site service ID**: `srv-d7t9j00sfn5c738a18j0`
- **Supabase project**: `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb` (URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`)
- **Owner user ID**: `9b280e15-f9fd-459f-bf2d-530b1ed84cb1` (email: `iperez4242@gmail.com`, accountType=owner)
- **Owner JWT saved at**: `/tmp/owner_jwt2.txt` (length 1540, ~1hr lifetime)
- **Vault snapshot**: `vault-2026-07-12T16-53-22-895Z-c4mah6` — 26 tables, 1605 rows, 8/8 validation passed
- **Supabase table counts**: investors=875, wallets=2, transactions=1, jv_deals=3, members=3
- **Reels UI changes NOT YET COMMITTED** — working tree has uncommitted changes in `expo/app/videos.tsx`, `ios-ivx/Ivx/Views/ProjectReelsView.swift`, `ios-ivx/Ivx/Services/VideoEngagementService.swift`

## Relevant Files
- `backend/services/ivx-data-vault.ts`: Vault snapshot with retry-without-order fix for non-id PK tables
- `expo/app/videos.tsx`: Reels screen — updated to match landing page (GOLD=#E6C200, filters All/Investments/Buyers/Sellers, close X, MIN OWNERSHIP)
- `expo/ivxholding-landing/ivx-reels.js`: Landing page reels — source of truth for app reels UI
- `expo/lib/video-platform.ts`: Engagement API client (save/follow/report/analytics)
- `expo/lib/video-feed.ts`: Video feed client with FeedVideo interface
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/Views/ProjectReelsView.swift`: iOS reels view — fully rewritten to match landing page
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/Services/VideoEngagementService.swift`: NEW — iOS engagement API service
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/Models/FeedVideo.swift`: iOS FeedVideo model with deal enrichment
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/ViewModels/ProjectReelsViewModel.swift`: iOS reels view model
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/Services/VideoFeedService.swift`: iOS video feed service
